svg.title: Health Data Pipeline: Ingestion, Persistence & Projections
svg.desc: Accurate end-to-end health pipeline detailing queue routing, the single-transaction boundary, transactional outbox, and watermark-aware async projections.
svg.text: Health Data Pipeline: Ingestion, Persistence & Projections
Complete structural flow: exact queue routing, strict transactional boundaries, and watermark-aware async projections.
Guarantees raw persistence, outbox eventing, and watermark progression are fully atomic.
Coalesces multiple user events into one payload.
Serves REST APIs. Applies freshness override:
